108800.description_ja_long: 奈良県曽爾村、屏風岩の背後にそびえる山。神武天皇の大和平定で土蜘蛛を討った伝承から名が生じたと伝わる。眺めのよい頂を持ち、室生の山々や遠く鈴鹿まで見渡せる。
108800.description_ja_short: 神武東征の伝承を名に宿す曽爾の山。頂の展望が広い。
108800.description_en_long: Kunimiyama towers behind the Byobuiwa cliff in Soni Village, Nara. Its name is said to have arisen from a legend that Emperor Jimmu subdued the tsuchigumo here during his pacification of Yamato. The scenic summit looks over the Muro mountains and even distant Suzuka.
108800.description_en_short: A Soni mountain whose name holds a legend of Jimmu's eastern campaign, with wide summit views.
